Decreases incoming damage in the Fractals of the Mists. Grants five stacks of the standard potion.
With Fractal Attunement Mastery, converts a portion of your agony resistance to toughness.
Turn in unwanted potions to Dessa's Alchemist for Fractal Relics.

Defeat the Swampland fractal boss and collect a sample of the peculiar swamp moss. Take it to the Opticalium in Metrica Province and charge it using their special station.
This item only has value as part of a collection.

Delicately penned on this scrap of paper is a list of secluded locations.

Deliver to the Castaway Vice Chief.

Delivers a lost bandit chest to your home instance.
Delivers a Pact Airship Cargo container to your home instance. Also contains 3 Pact Crowbars.
Delivers an enchanted chest to your home instance that replenishes itself daily.
Delivers an Exalted Chest to your home instance. Also contains 3 Exalted Keys.
Deploy a sentry turret that reveals enemy positions within a radius of 1200 on the map.
Deploy bombs at the supply depot that will explode if the objective is captured by an enemy team. The explosion will destroy all remaining supply at the objective.

Deposit into a pile of carrots for the springers at Highjump Ranch or trade to Stablemaster Unja for special Adventurer's Goods.
